lore.spawn.blasted_sand: A black colored sand that can be found in volcanic areas, and smelted into Glass. It is affected by gravity.
lore.spawn.blasted_sandstone: A block that makes an excellent building material, as it is not affected by gravity.
lore.spawn.chiseled_blasted_sandstone: A block of Ashen Sandstone with a chiseled pattern.
lore.spawn.cut_blasted_sandstone: A block of Ashen Sandstone that has been cut. Unlike Ashen Sand, it isn't affected by gravity.
lore.spawn.smooth_blasted_sandstone: A block of Ashen Sandstone that has been perfectly smelted to a point where it has become perfectly smooth.
